title: pinus teocote subsp. macrocarpa
intro: Pinus teocote subsp. macrocarpa, also known as the Teocote Pine, is a subspecies of evergreen pine tree native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds found in its resin and needles. The health benefits of Pinus teocote subsp. macrocarpa include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the needles or resin, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
